title: style-review step result
description: Sidecar schema for the style-review workflow step.

ticket.description: JIRA ticket ID as provided by the user (preserves original case)

fixes_applied.description: Number of in-place edits the docs-reviewer agent applied. Parsed from the agent's `Fixes applied: N` output line.

warnings.description: Number of style warnings the agent reported. Parsed from the agent's `Warnings: N` output line.

suggestions.description: Number of style suggestions the agent reported. Parsed from the agent's `Suggestions: N` output line.
